name: Vellikkeel Waves
whatsappGreeting: Hi Vellikkeel Waves! I would like to know more about your cruises.

seo.homeTitle: Vellikkeel Waves — Houseboat & Mangrove Cruises in Kannur, Kerala
seo.homeDescription: Houseboat day trips, sunset cruises and overnight stays on the Vellikkeel river near Pattuvam, Kannur — through Kerala's largest undisturbed mangrove belt. Book on WhatsApp.
seo.aboutTitle: About Us & Our Team — Vellikkeel Waves, Kannur
seo.aboutDescription: Meet the local crew behind Vellikkeel Waves — the team running houseboat cruises through the Vellikkeel mangroves in Kannur, Kerala. Our story, our river, our people.
seo.keywords: Vellikkeel Waves, houseboat Kannur, mangrove cruise Kerala, Vellikkeel eco park, Pattuvam boating, sunset cruise Kannur, Kerala backwater Kannur, kandal kadu boat
